label: Psychic ritual -- philophagy
description: Ritual where the invoker psychically consumes the target's skill experience. May inflict brain damage on the target.

brainDamageRange.label: Brain damage range
brainDamageRange.description: Random amount of brain damage inflicted on the target pawn.

xpTransferFromQualityCurve.label: XP transfer from quality curve
xpTransferFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the fraction of skill XP transferred from target to invoker.
